statement: London Scalper on XAUUSD shows positive expectancy during London session when spread < 25 points and ATR > 80 points.
relevance_for_decisions: Session allocation and symbol routing for XAUUSD scalping EAs

audit_trail_excerpt.justification: Initial evidence package meets provisional bar.
Independent review confirms pattern across 38 comparable trades.

note: FullyValidatedConclusion must become KnowledgeCandidate before entering permanent Knowledge.
